mainService: Full-service property management for single-family rentals
bestFitCustomers: Real estate investors growing portfolios in Central Florida
badFitCustomers: Owners who want hands-on day-to-day involvement
commonProblems: Owner statements not arriving on time
commonSalesQuestions: How fast do you respond to maintenance?

pricing.summary: Management fee is 10% of collected rent; leasing fee is 1 month's rent for new tenants.
ranges: Leasing fee: 50-100% of one month's rent
pricingFactors: Whether leasing is included or per-event

differentiators: Owner statements by the 10th of every month
Vetted vendor network with bid-required threshold
Tenant screening with credit, criminal, eviction, and income verification
guarantees: If a placed tenant leaves in the first 6 months, the next placement is free
Maintenance dispatch SLA: 24 hours non-urgent, immediate for emergencies

reviews.author: Out-of-state owner
reviews.text: I haven't had to think about my rental in 18 months. Statements always arrive on time and tenants are quiet.

caseStudies.title: Filled a stale vacancy in 12 days for an investor
caseStudies.problem: Previous PM had a unit vacant 60+ days.
caseStudies.approach: Repriced, repainted, restaged photos, and re-marketed across 3 channels.
caseStudies.result: Qualified tenant placed in 12 days at $50/mo above original ask.

competitors.name: Big PM Co.
competitors.whenClientWins: Owners wanting a local team and direct point of contact

founderStory: Founded by a former landlord who got tired of being on call 24/7.
